74571.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Paradigm discovers El Dorado
74571.body:
Bernstein says Robinhood could see 'strong tailwinds' as World Cup drives record prediction market volumes | Michael Saylor's Strategy buys another 1,587 BTC for $100 million | Tom Lee sees 'early stages of crypto spring' as Bitmine buys another 76,881 ETH | Kraken launches crypto perps trading in the US |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! *Bitcoin* climbed back above $67,000 after reports of a U.S.-Iran peace deal eased fears of further geopolitical escalation, with analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404723/bitcoin-tops-65000-us-iran-peace-deal?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) describing the move as a broad "risk-on" rally driven by improving market sentiment rather than crypto-specific catalysts.

In today's newsletter, *Paradigm* leads a $9 million round for *El Dorado* , the *World Cup* drives record prediction market volumes, *Strategy* buys another $100 million worth of *bitcoin* , and more.

Meanwhile, on the ground at *BTC Prague* last week, *Strive* CIO *Ben Werkman* said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404741/strive-cio-says-prolonged-bitcoin-weakness-could-drive-treasury-firm-consolidation?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) any prolonged *bitcoin* weakness could drive further treasury firm consolidation. Plus, *Trezor* Chief Commercial Officer *Danny Sanders* argued ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404752/lets-put-it-in-etf-worst-outcome-bitcoin-says-trezor-exec?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) that "let's just put it in an ETF" is the worst outcome for *bitcoin*.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*💰 Paradigm leads $9 million round for LatAm payments app El Dorado*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404709/paradigm-leads-9-million-round-el-dorado?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Paradigm* led a $9 million Series A round for Latin American cross-border payments app *El Dorado* , with participation from *Coinbase Ventures* and *Verda Ventures*.

* El Dorado said it serves more than 100,000 active users and has processed over 5 million transactions since launching in 2022.
* CEO *Guillermo Goncalvez* argued that Latin America's cross-borde

74566.subject: Data & Insights: Polymarket App Ranking Highs; SpaceX Hyperliquid
74566.body:
The Data and Insights newsletter brings the highlights of the week from The Block’s Data Dashboard

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot )

Presented By

( https://www.socure.com/ )

1: Hype-d For Flows

( https://www.theblock.co/data/etfs/crypto-etfs/hype-spot-etf-flows )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Roughly a month since the first spot HYPE ETFs hit the market, early volume data is strong, suggesting an institutional market for Hyperliquid.

* Three products now offer regulated brokerage exposure to HYPE: THYP from 21Shares, BHYP from Bitwise, and HYPG from Grayscale.  Cumulative volume across the three has approached $900 million since launch, with net inflows reaching $153 million.
* HYPE distinguishes itself from tokens whose value proposition relies more heavily on speculative demand. 97% of Hyperliquid's trading fees are directed to the Assistance Fund, creating a direct link between trading volume and token demand through an automatic buyback mechanism.

* All three ETFs hold HYPE directly and pass through staking rewards to investors. At current staking levels, the reward rate sits at approximately 2.25% ( https://www.bhypetf.com/ ) annually, with rewards accrued every minute, distributed daily, and automatically compounded. Roughly 45% of the eligible supply is currently staked, representing approximately 434 million HYPE.

* Volume across the three products has been uneven, with BHYP and THYP accounting for the bulk of activity while HYPG, the most recent entrant, continues to ramp.

* Sustained ETF inflows at this pace would represent a meaningful demand signal. The pace of inflows in months two and three will be a more reliable gauge of conviction than launch-window volume.

See the Interactive Chart ( https://www.theblock.co/data/etfs/crypto-etfs/hype-spot-etf-flows )

2: Stables Worldwide-ish

( https://www.theblock.co/data/stablecoins/non-usd-pegged/non-usd-pegged-stablecoins-supply )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Non-USD stablecoin supply, excluding the sanctioned ruble-pegged A7A5, has climbed from roughly $2.7 billion to $15 billion year to date, a trajectory that reflects growing sovereign interest in blockchain-native settlement infrastructure outside of dollar-denominated rails.

* Stablecoins are digital tokens pegged to a reference asset, typically a fiat currency, that enable near-instant, programmable value transfer across borders. For non-US economies, they offer a mechanism to conduct cross-border trade and settlements without routing through correspondent banking networks or dollar-dependent systems.

* The leading contributors to this growth include JPY Coin, Argentine Peso, Brazilian Digital, and GYEN, each representing domestic financial institutions or regulated entities building stablecoin infrastructure anchored to their home currency. Argenti

74564.subject: A US-Iran deal is only the beginning of the end of the war
74564.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDh9AAcAAAAAArx1DftaNH5Dchjn9hB8NsrdG10GXVp4cUq5jzBc2dCk-Wnm93g4AU8nEYhv79dFSgsT5cBGwELNK2yd07V_hZjBauHkvHvWdsNKJ-xnTw 

June 15th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDh9AAcAAAAAArx1DftbBp6FsngN--nA1XmC5uqgR1qk8TQJdbLEXXBBfU3lS656qoadRsmlLYmGQI0aZwEzbJInZP-htWAVbVQjhmmIKK34ufa7kPvsDw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDh9AAcAAAAAArx1Dftcqnn15Hzj4-v8nuKXWnZfnXapOTu1bD36K_pDkNzdzatiobqAX4sQITd5wgW4s9mw78l41toklqXM3TCvNwVODwf80-VL5fbMUQ 



 
 

Stephanie Studer

Senior digital editor



Luckily someone has been keeping track. On roughly 40 occasions since March, Donald Trump has claimed to be close to a deal with Iran. At last 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDh9AAcAAAAAArx1DftdOzmnipi306x4cJoQEwPWp3Cp4AhVEfmEL5W4kl94QJ051kgoJMa1exKgC2ErIVXGlIv8qvdm0zlT2b7mf7ZhbufCOc3c 
he is right . According to reports, confirmed to The Economist by one diplomat, this is really a deal to keep talking about a deal—culminating, in just 60 days, in a final agreement about Iran’s nuclear programme. That is a tall order.


In other news: you may be among the three-quarters of Brits who support a social-media ban for children, or feel an affinity for them wherever you are in the world. But beware Sir Keir Starmer

 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
 Совместимость проверить легко: ваши натальные карты скажут все за вас
Здравствуйте, Олег! Было ли с вами такое, что встречаете нового для себя человека, а с ним так легко, как будто вы давно знакомы? Или наоборот, вы еще человека не знаете, а он уже вас отталкивает и раздражает?
Тема совместимости в астропсихологии изучается уже много лет и считается одной из самых увлекательных. Она применяется не только в сфере любви, о которой мы чаще всего говорим, но и в бизнесе, карьере, партнерских и деловых отношениях.
"Телец хорошо подходит Козерогу, а Козероги терпеть не могут Водолеев", - слышали такое? Наверняка, ведь интернет переполнен этой информацией.
Но, уверена, что вас удивит реальное положение вещей, основанное на тонких расчетах, в отличие от информации в Интернете, которой, мне кажется вы прочли, и так немало.
Пробная сокращенная версия -- бесплатно:
 Открыть гороскоп совместимости [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/love/masterv2?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
 Чем поможет гороскоп совместимости?
Чаще всего обращаются за расчетом синастрии (а именно так мы называем этот гороскоп в кругу астрологов и астропсихологов) в следующих случаях:
В начале новых отношений. Если вы только начали встречаться с кем-то и хотите узнать, насколько глубоко ваши планеты могут быть связаны, проверка астрологической совместимости поможет вам лучше понять потенциал ваших отношений.
Период неопределенности или сомнений. Когда вы оказываетесь на перепутье в отношениях, не уверены в чувствах партнера или своих, совместимость может предоставить дополнительное понимание ситуации и помочь принять важные решения.
Планирование будущего. Перед принятием важных решений, таких как совместное проживание, брак или планирование семьи, совместимость даст представление о будущих вызов

🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: SpaceX's surprise 18,712 BTC treasury and a nearly-signed US-Iran peace deal are pushing Bitcoin toward $65K. The $TRUMP meme coin meanwhile crystallizes as a $616M windfall for the Trump family and a $700M loss for retail. 🚀 SpaceX IPO Reveals 18,712 BTC Treasury, Vaulting It to 8th-Largest Public Bitcoin Holder SpaceX's blockbuster public market debut did more than mint the world's most valuable aerospace company — it disclosed a previously unknown corporate Bitcoin treasury of 18,712 BTC, instantly ranking the firm among the largest publicly known corporate Bitcoin holders globally. The disclosure arrived alongside a $9 billion surge in SpaceX-linked crypto derivatives trading within a single 24-hour window, with $5.6 billion of that volume flowing through Binance alone, underscoring how rapidly crypto markets absorbed the IPO's momentum. Read full story → ☮️ Bitcoin Climbs Toward $65K as Trump Announces Sunday Iran Peace Deal and Hormuz Opening President Trump declared the US-Iran peace deal would be signed Sunday, with the Strait of Hormuz set to reopen to all international shipping — a development that pushed Bitcoin above $63K and toward a local high near $65K, as crypto analysts flagged a Hormuz reopening as a direct liquidity unlock for global risk assets. Iran separately confirmed a 60-day oil sales framework and agreed to nuclear limits and a $24 billion asset release in a draft memorandum, though Tehran subsequently warned the Sunday signing timeline could slip after Israel's strikes on Beirut added new diplomatic friction. More details → 💸 $TRUMP Meme Coin Delivered $616M to Trump's Family While Buyers Absorbed $700M in Losses New data on the $TRUMP meme coin paints a stark picture of asymmetric outcomes: the Trump family collected approximately $616 million from the token while retail participants collectively absorbed losses exceeding $700 million, making it one of the most lopsided value-transfer events in recent crypto market history. The figures arrive at a politically sensitive moment as the Trump administration continues to shape US crypto policy — including the GENIUS Act for stablecoins and the CLARITY Act for market structure — with critics arguing that the president's direct financial interest in a speculative meme token represents an unresolved conflict of interest at the hig
